monitor_the_situation.title: Iranian FM Araghchi Visits for Ayatollah Khamenei Funeral Preparations
— S4 · Political · Tehran, Iran · 23h ago. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi states his visit includes preparations for the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, signaling succession planning.

Oil Prices Surge as US-Iran Strikes Disrupt Strait of Hormuz

— S3 · Economic · Strait of Hormuz · 4h ago. Brent crude rises after US and Iranian retaliatory strikes near the Strait of Hormuz delay shipping through the key oil chokepoint, with US production cushioning markets.
